languages.text: {n}Вы слышите, как нарастает гул турбин авиации. Слышите, как запускаются ракеты. Но не взрыв. Его вы ощущаете, пусть и на доли мгновения, прежде чем ваше тело разорвет на куски.{/n}

{n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы слышите, как нарастает гул турбин авиации. Слышите, как запускаются ракеты. Но не взрыв. Его вы ощущаете, пусть и на доли мгновения, прежде чем ваше тело разорвет на куски.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

{n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

{n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你听到了战机引擎的轰鸣声越来越响，也听到了火箭发射时的尖啸。你没有听到爆炸声——但你感觉到了，哪怕只有短短一瞬，紧接着你的身体就被撕成了碎片。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你听到了战机引擎的轰鸣声越来越响，也听到了火箭发射时的尖啸。你没有听到爆炸声——但你感觉到了，哪怕只有短短一瞬，紧接着你的身体就被撕成了碎片。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vrombissement des réacteurs se fait de plus en plus fort, bientôt suivi par le sifflement des roquettes que les aéronefs viennent de tirer. Vous n'entendez pas l'explosion, mais vous la sentez, ne serait-ce qu'une fraction de seconde, avant que votre corps soit réduit en charpie.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vrombissement des réacteurs se fait de plus en plus fort, bientôt suivi par le sifflement des roquettes que les aéronefs viennent de tirer. Vous n'entendez pas l'explosion, mais vous la sentez, ne serait-ce qu'une fraction de seconde, avant que votre corps soit réduit en charpie.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Uçak türbinlerinin yükselen kükremesini duyuyorsun. Fırlatılan roketlerin ıslığını duyuyorsun. Patlamayı duymuyorsun. Ancak patlamayı hissediyorsun, saniyeler sonra da bedenin parçalara ayrılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Uçak türbinlerinin yükselen kükremesini duyuyorsun. Fırlatılan roketlerin ıslığını duyuyorsun. Patlamayı duymuyorsun. Ancak patlamayı hissediyorsun, saniyeler sonra da bedenin parçalara ayrılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Oyes el rugido cada vez más poderoso de las turbinas de las aeronaves. Oyes el susurro de los misiles en movimiento. No oyes la explosión, pero sí la sientes, aunque solo por una fracción de segundo, antes de que tu cuerpo se desgarre por completo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Oyes el rugido cada vez más poderoso de las turbinas de las aeronaves. Oyes el susurro de los misiles en movimiento. No oyes la explosión, pero sí la sientes, aunque solo por una fracción de segundo, antes de que tu cuerpo se desgarre por completo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du hörst das anschwellende Dröhnen von Flugzeugtriebwerken. Du hörst das Zischen startender Raketen. Nur die Explosion hörst du nicht. Aber du spürst sie — wenn auch nur für den Bruchteil einer Sekunde —, ehe dein Körper in Stücke gerissen wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du hörst das anschwellende Dröhnen von Flugzeugtriebwerken. Du hörst das Zischen startender Raketen. Nur die Explosion hörst du nicht. Aber du spürst sie — wenn auch nur für den Bruchteil einer Sekunde —, ehe dein Körper in Stücke gerissen wird.{/n}

languages.text: {n}飛行機のタービンが唸り、ロケットが打ち上げられる音は聞こえる。爆発音は聞こえない。しかし、一瞬のうちに体がバラバラにされる前に、爆発の衝撃を感じ取る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear the rising roar of aircraft turbines. You hear the whistle of launching rockets. You do not hear the explosion. But you feel it, if only for a fraction of an instant, before your body is ripped to pieces.{/n}
